subcodes.first_line: O scion of that illustrious personage who attained the good-pleasure of the All-Powerful Lord, at the hour of morn and at the time of departure [3.5s]... ...O divine Providence! These friends are Thy companions, and this gathering of ardent lovers is enamored of Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله شخصی خطیر راضی و مرضی درگاه حضرت رب قدیر وقت ضحی و هنگام حرکت و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
